title: psephellus gilanicus
intro: Psephellus gilanicus, also known as the Gilanic psephellus or Golden Ragwort, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and boosting the immune system. Psephellus gilanicus can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, teas, and tinctures, making it accessible for consumption.
